description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, tiled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns, and a balcony runs the length of the upper floor. Large, evenly spaced windows line both stories, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway with two palm trees, a parked car, and a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. Surrounding the house are several trees, adding greenery and privacy to the urban setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch with columns, and a backyard pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, driveway, palm trees, and part of the backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and the rear balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard pool area, umbrella, and the side of the house with palm trees in the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, and steps leading to a prominent front door.
